description: Water dripping under my kitchen sink and the cabinet floor is damp. Started about 2 days ago.
Outlet not working in the living room. Other outlets on the same wall seem fine.
Window frame weatherstripping is falling off and I can feel a draft.
Shower drain is draining very slowly. Tried plunging but it did not help.
My AC runs all day but the house never cools down below 78 degrees.
Ants are all over my kitchen counters especially near the window.
The washing machine stopped spinning mid-cycle. It fills with water but just sits there.
There is a water stain on the ceiling of my living room directly under the upstairs bathroom.
Breaker trips every time I plug in the microwave in the kitchen.
Need two ceiling fans installed in the bedrooms. Existing wiring is already in place.
Roof is leaking near the chimney after last weeks rain. There is a brown stain on the ceiling.
Kitchen faucet handle is loose and drips constantly even when fully closed.
